appraisal.description: A cracked brass apothecary scale whose empty pan hangs level with the weighted side.

clues.result: Fine tally scratches cover one pan while the matching pan is smooth.
UV light reveals old fingerprints under the empty pan, as if something invisible was weighed there.
The empty pan is colder than the weighted pan.

appraisal.wrong_handling_consequence: If sold or thrown out, the scale keeps undercounting every debt by one coin until the shop is blamed.

generation.concept_prompt: A cracked brass apothecary balance scale for a cursed antique shop game, one empty pan hanging level with a weighted pan, tally scratches, old pharmacy wear, readable silhouette, no text.
generation.model_prompt: Small antique brass apothecary balance scale game prop, cracked central beam, one empty pan subtly lower, tarnished metal, worn pharmacy base, clear readable silhouette, no text, no logo.
